data.title: Write RED test test_phase_counter_display for onboarding SKILL.md phase counter
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Implementation Notes
Add test function `test_phase_counter_display` to `tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh`.

This is a structural boundary test per Behavioral Testing Standard Rule 5 (SKILL.md is non-executable). The phase counter format (Phase N of Y) is a structural contract that sibling story 4c55-0c7a depends on when adding its dependency scan phase.

Test approach (Given/When/Then):
- Given: `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md` exists
- When: grep searches for structural pattern `Phase [0-9]\+ of [0-9]\+`
- Then: grep exits 0; currently exits non-zero because pattern absent (RED state)

Implementation steps:
1. After Task 5eb4-e268 is merged, open `tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh` and add `test_phase_counter_display` function using the same `_snapshot_fail` + `assert_eq` pattern.
2. The function should grep SKILL.md for `Phase [0-9]\+ of [0-9]\+` pattern (use grep -qE or grep -qP).
3. Register the function in the run loop at the bottom of the file.
4. Append a new line to `.test-index` (separate line, NOT modifying existing entries):
   `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh [test_phase_counter_display]`
5. Confirm the test fails (RED) on unmodified SKILL.md before committing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Lint passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Format check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] test_phase_counter_display function exists in test-onboarding-skill.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test_phase_counter_display' tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added in correct separate-line format
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh \[test_phase_counter_display\]' .test-index
- [ ] Test currently fails (RED) on unmodified SKILL.md
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL.*test_phase_counter_display'
